name: com.cidonix.unibridge
description: Local MCP tools that let AI coding agents inspect, edit, capture, and validate Unity Editor projects through a per-project bridge and relay.

_upm.changelog:
### Fixed

- RuntimeStateProbe Sample and Assert now capture directly from one persistent EditorApplication.update subscription instead of chaining an async yield per sample.
- Sampling remains active when gameplay time is paused with Time.timeScale equal to zero.
- RuntimeStateProbe reserves scheduler timeout headroom and returns partial sample count, completion reason, and wait reason if its internal editor-tick budget expires.
- Cancellation and completion always remove the editor update callback so read-only scheduler slots are released.
- MCP regression captures 180 of 180 samples in Play Mode while Time.timeScale is zero and verifies activeReaders returns to zero.

### Previous Changes

- ManageGameObject Create applies and verifies private serialized ComponentProperties in Edit and Play Mode.
- Mixed ScriptApplyEdits Preview and Apply use one ordered in-memory pipeline with SHA parity.
- VersionControl supports single and multi-asset workflows with per-asset diagnostics.
